title: alisma echinocarpum
intro: Alisma echinocarpum, also known as Chinese water plantain or zé xié, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the water-plantain family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing edema, alleviating urinary tract infections, and improving liver function. Alisma echinocarpum is typically prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
